tagline: We Treat Your Pool Like It's Our Own

hero.headline:
Your Pool Deserves the ROCKSTAR
Treatment
hero.subheadline: For 19 years, Central NJ families have trusted Mystic Pool & Spa to keep their backyard oasis crystal clear and swim-ready. AST and CPO certified technicians handle everything so you can stop worrying and just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool & Spa Care<br class="hidden md:block"> From Open to Close
services.subtitle: From seasonal openings to equipment upgrades, Mystic Pool & Spa handles every aspect of pool ownership so you can enjoy your backyard all season long.

cards.title: Pool Opening & Closing
cards.description: Complete seasonal startup and winterization services including equipment inspection, water balancing, cover installation, and system shutdown to protect your investment year-round.

cards.title: Weekly Maintenance Plans
cards.description: Regularly scheduled chemical balancing, skimming, vacuuming, and equipment checks. Choose our ROCKSTAR Package for the ultimate all-inclusive pool care experience.

cards.title: Equipment Sales & Installation
cards.description: New filters, heaters, pumps, salt chlorine generators, and automation systems. Expert installation and repair from certified technicians who know your equipment inside out.

cards.title: Safety Covers
cards.description: Authorized Merlin Industries dealer offering professional measurement, sale, and installation of custom safety covers for peace of mind during the off-season.

cards.title: Leak Detection & Repair
cards.description: Professional leak detection services to pinpoint issues in your pool structure, plumbing, or equipment. Fast diagnosis means faster fixes and less water waste.

cards.title: Hot Tub & Spa Service
cards.description: Year-round hot tub maintenance including inspections, seasonal openings and closings, chemical balancing, and repairs to keep your spa running perfectly.

steps.title: Call, Text, or Email Us
steps.description: Reach out however is easiest for you. Tell us about your pool and what you need. We respond quickly and provide an honest, no-pressure quote.

steps.title: We Send Our Certified Crew
steps.description: Our AST and CPO certified technicians arrive on schedule with everything needed. Opening, closing, maintenance, or repairs — we handle it all professionally.

steps.title: Relax & Enjoy Your Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready all season long. We treat it like our own, so you never have to worry about a thing.

about.label: Why Central NJ Trusts Mystic Pool
about.headline: Family-Owned, Honest, and Here for the Long Haul
about.description: Founded by Jay Kellers in 2007, Mystic Pool & Spa was built on a simple philosophy: be honest, be trustworthy, and deliver only the highest quality service. With over 25 years of combined experience and a team of AST and CPO certified professionals, we have earned our reputation as one of the best pool companies in Monmouth and Middlesex Counties. We are not a faceless corporation — we are your neighbors who genuinely care about your pool.

features.title: Certified & Experienced Crew
features.description: Every technician is AST and CPO certified with years of hands-on experience. Your pool is in expert hands every single visit.

features.title: Honest & Transparent Service
features.description: No upselling, no hidden fees, no surprises. We tell you exactly what your pool needs and give you fair, straightforward pricing.

features.title: Responsive & Reliable
features.description: Text us, call us, or email us — we get back to you fast. We show up on time, every time, because your schedule matters.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose a maintenance plan that fits your pool and budget. From basic care to our premium ROCKSTAR Package, every plan delivers honest value.

guarantee.headline: Our "Treat It Like Our Own" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call or text us and we will come back to make it right at no additional charge. We have built our reputation on honesty and quality for 19 years, and we stand behind every visit. Your pool deserves the best, and we will not stop until it shines.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within a few days. For urgent issues like equipment failures or green pools, we prioritize and get to you as fast as possible. Just call or text us at 732-656-0200.

faqs.question: What is the ROCKSTAR Package?
faqs.answer: Our ROCKSTAR Package is our premium all-inclusive maintenance plan. It covers everything — weekly cleaning, chemical balancing, equipment checks, and priority scheduling. It is our highest level of care for pool owners who want a completely worry-free experience.

faqs.question: Do you service hot tubs and spas too?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We provide full hot tub and spa service including yearly inspections, seasonal openings and closings, chemical balancing, and repairs. Same great care we give to pools.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our staff holds AST (Association of Pool & Spa Professionals) and CPO (Certified Pool Operator) certifications. We invest in ongoing training to stay current with the latest equipment and techniques.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Central New Jersey including Monmouth County and Middlesex County — Long Branch, West Long Branch, Old Bridge, Marlboro, Ocean Township, Monroe Township, and surrounding communities.

testimonials.name: Jon A.
testimonials.text: These guys are great. First time pool owner and attempting to balance everything by myself. These guys made it easy to do just that.

testimonials.name: Meghan M.
testimonials.text: We have always had a great experience with Mystic Pool and everyone who we have ever encountered. The service department is amazing.

testimonials.name: Gordon D.
testimonials.text: Mystic Pool is incredibly responsive. They take their time answering questions, show up at the scheduled time for service.

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool That
Takes Care of Itself?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, honest quote from Mystic Pool & Spa. No pressure, no gimmicks — just straightforward pricing from a family business that has been doing this for 19 years.
benefits: Free pool inspection with every quote
